返回本批次

ARM AGI CPU：规格和 SKU

ARM AGI CPU: Specs and SKUs

sbcwiki.com 作者 HeyMeco 分数 103 评论 27 2026/03/25 01:59
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 虽然 Arm 主要向其他制造商授权 CPU 和 GPU 设计，但他们也为特定数据中心和 AI 基础设施应用生产自己的芯片。ARM AGI CPU#于 2026 年 3 月 24 日在 Arm Everywhere 主题演讲中宣布，ARM AGI CPU 是 Arm 的首款量产芯片，专为大规模 AI 基础设施而设计。它提供了新型 CPU，具有高性能和极高的机架级密度支持，支持现代数据中心的代理 AI 操作。 规格#核心：多达 136 个 Neoverse V3 核心（2x 128 SVE，2MB/核心 L2）架构：带有 bfloat16 和 INT8 AI 指令的 Armv9.2 时钟速度：高达 3.7GHz boostPCIe：96 通道 PCIe Gen6， CXL 3.0 Type 3 工艺：3nm 光刻工艺 TDP：高达 420W TDPM 内存：高达 6 TB 的 DDR5-8800（12 个 DDR5 通道）设计：双芯片设计 SKU#ARM AGI CPU 提供三种不同的 SKU：SP113012：136 核旗舰型号，可实现最大核心数SP113012S：针对总体拥有成本 (TCO) 进行了优化的 128 核型号。SP113012A：针对每个核心的最大内存带宽进行了优化的 64 核型号。服务器配置#Arm 的参考服务器配置是 10U、2 节点设计 – 封装在两个具有专用内存和 I/O 的芯片中，每个刀片总共有 272 个核心。这些刀片设计用于完全填充标准风冷 36kW 机架 - 30 个刀片可提供总共 8160 个核心。Arm 还与 Supermicro 合作开发了液冷 200kW 设计，能够容纳 336 个 Arm AGI CPU，超过 45,000 个核心。有关更多信息，请访问官方 Arm AGI CPU 页面或阅读产品简介。

Original Summary

  1. While Arm primarily licenses CPU and GPU designs to other manufacturers, they also produce their own silicon for specific datacenter and AI infrastructure applications.ARM AGI CPU#Announced at the Arm Everywhere Keynote on March 24, 2026, the ARM AGI CPU is Arm’s first production silicon, designed for AI infrastructure at scale. It delivers a new class of CPU with high performance and extreme rack-level density support for agentic AI operations across modern data centers.Specifications#Cores: Up to 136 Neoverse V3 cores (2x 128 SVE, 2MB/core L2)Architecture: Armv9.2 with bfloat16 and INT8 AI instructionsClock Speed: Up to 3.7GHz boostPCIe: 96 Lanes of PCIe Gen6, CXL 3.0 Type 3Process: 3nm lithography processTDP: Up to 420W TDPMemory: Up to 6 Terabyte of DDR5-8800 (12x DDR5 channels)Design: Dual-Chiplet DesignSKUs#The ARM AGI CPU is available in three distinct SKUs:SP113012: 136-core flagship model for maximum core count.SP113012S: 128-core model optimized for Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).SP113012A: 64-core model optimized for maximum memory bandwidth per core.Server Configurations#Arm’s reference server configuration is a 10U, 2-node design – packing in two chips with dedicated memory and I/O for a total of 272 cores per blade. These blades are designed to fully populate a standard air-cooled 36kW rack – 30 blades delivering a total of 8160 cores.Arm has additionally partnered with Supermicro on a liquid-cooled 200kW design capable of housing 336 Arm AGI CPUs for over 45,000 cores.For more information, visit the official Arm AGI CPU page or read the Product Brief.

评论（默认中文）

HeyMeco 2026/03/25 03:00
对于 Arm 来说，使用基于 2023 年的移动 X4 内核而不是当前的 C1 Ultra 确实是一个选择。希望他们能尽快站起来
It really is a choice for Arm to use their 2023 based mobile X4 cores instead of their current C1 Ultras for this. Hopefully they step up quickly
在 HN 中查看
hajile 2026/03/25 05:29
验证核心是否符合服务器标准需要更长的时间。

使用 X925 的 V4 核心应该会在今年推出，而基于 C1 Ultra 的 V5 可能会在 2027-2028 年推出。

我怀疑，当使用整个芯片时，X4 的速度已经足以在每核心性能上击败 EPYC。 2019 年至 2020 年，ARM 在 IPC 中一直在 A77/78 左右赶上/超过了 x86。它们现在的每个时钟速度更快，并且达到与标准 EPYC（更不用说 zen5c EPYC）相同的全核时钟速度。

最大的问题是 Graviton5 已经开始投放市场并使用相同的 v3 内核。该芯片的大部分市场份额可能来自安培客户。

Validating a core to server standards takes significantly longer.

V4 cores should be out this year using X925 and C1 Ultra-based V5 will probably be 2027-2028.

I suspect that X4 is already fast enough to beat EPYC in per-core performance when using the whole chip. ARM caught up/passed x86 in IPC all the way back around A77/78 in 2019-2020. They are now much faster per clock and hitting about the same all-core clockspeeds as standard EPYC (let alone zen5c EPYC).

The big issue is that Graviton5 is already starting to hit the market and uses the same v3 cores. A lot of marketshare for this chip will probably come from taking Ampere customers.

rbanffy 2026/03/25 04:10
我认为唯一进入超大规模 CPU 市场的 ARM 授权商是 Ampere。亚马逊和微软为自己制造 CPU，而 Nvidia 则专门针对驱动其 GPU 的人工智能工作负载。
I think the only ARM licensee going for the hyperscaler CPU market is Ampere. Amazon and Microsoft make CPUs for themselves and Nvidia’s are aimed exclusively at AI workloads driving their GPUs.

lucasay 2026/03/25 02:34

Not sure how to feel about this. Does this mean ARM is slowly moving from just licensing IP to actually competing with companies building on top of it?

boxedemp 2026/03/25 10:16

SB 喜欢 10 倍购买。

I figured they would do this when SoftBank acquired them.

SB likes 10x buys.

heuristo 2026/03/25 02:22
这看起来很糟糕，不是吗？我已经知道，自 IPO 以来，ARM 与其客户之间就更高的许可费问题一直存在摩擦，只是试图将这一点放在背景中。
This seems bad, doesn’t it? I already know that there has been friction between arm and their customers over higher licensing fees since the IPO just trying to put this in context.
在 HN 中查看
arrty88 2026/03/25 07:48
这对消费者来说是件好事。更多的选择带来更多的选择意味着更多的竞争意味着更低的价格。对哪个群体不利？
This is great for consumers. More options leads to more choices means more competition means lower prices. Which group is it bad for?
在 HN 中查看
mghackerlady 2026/03/25 15:33
那些认为标准是一件好事的人。 ARM 制造自己的 CPU 将他们的重点从制造一个好的 ISA 供人们使用转向制造一个好的 ISA 以在自己的 CPU 中使用。
The ones who recognize standards as a good thing. ARM making their own CPUs shifts their focus from making a good ISA for people to use to making a good ISA to use in their own CPUs.
在 HN 中查看
HeyMeco 2026/03/25 02:32
我想知道 Ampere 的人现在在想什么
I wonder what the people at Ampere are thinking right now
在 HN 中查看
ibgeek 2026/03/25 04:31
同意。 ARM AGI CPU 支持更新版本的矢量化指令，并具有 AmpereOne M 不具备的矩阵数学扩展。还具有几乎两倍的内存带宽。至少在一篇论文中，AGI CPU 似乎是人工智能工作负载的更好选择。 Ampere 确实在推动 AmpereOne M 的人工智能工作负载用例，因此这确实让他们的生活变得更加困难。
Agreed. The ARM AGI CPU supports a newer version of the vectorized instructions and has matrix math extensions that the AmpereOne M doesn’t. Also has almost twice the memory bandwidth. One paper at least, the AGI CPU seems like a better choice for AI workloads. Ampere is really pushing the AI workload use cases for the AmpereOne M, so this really makes their lives a lot harder.
在 HN 中查看
lizknope 2026/03/25 04:51
软银仍然拥有 ARM 90% 的股份，并且就在几个月前的 2025 年 11 月，他们完成了对 Ampere 的收购。

我是一名芯片设计师，如此复杂的芯片从开始到实际生产大约需要 3 年时间，所以它应该早在软银开始收购 Ampere 之前就开始了。

新闻稿称，它是与 Meta 共同开发的，Meta 拥有不断壮大的定制芯片团队。 通常，这些芯片（例如亚马逊的 Graviton 或谷歌的 Axion）仅供其自己的数据中心使用并租给客户。 这款 ARM 芯片听起来像是 Meta 和其他公司都可以为自己的数据中心购买芯片。

我猜测软银会让 ARM 和 Ampere 在未来的芯片上保持一致，或者只是将 Ampere 完全合并到 ARM 中。

Softbank still owns 90% of ARM and they finished their acquisition of Ampere only a few months ago in November 2025.

I'm a chip designer and a chip this complicated takes about 3 years from start to actual silicon so it would have started well before Softbank started their acquisition process of Ampere.

The press release says it was co-developed with Meta who has a growing custom chip team. Normally these chips like Amazon's Graviton or Google's Axion are designed for their own data center use only and rented to customers. This ARM chip sounds like Meta and other companies will all be able to buy chips for their own data centers.

I'm guessing Softbank will get ARM and Ampere to align on future chips or just merge Ampere completely into ARM.

ARM naming a chip AGI is either the most confident product launch in history or the best marketing we have seen in years. Probably both.
